'''Twith''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Twith system/Legends|Twith system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] on one end of the [[Hyabb-Twith Corridor]]. It was constantly at war with [[Hyabb]].
{{Planet-stub}}
